title: Closeout Steps 5b/5c: add bytype/ capability check before running
signal: Steps 5b and 5c assume bytype/ directory structure. Flat-lug spokes silently skip all per-type file operations, producing no output and no error. Fix: add capability check at start of 5b — if WAI-Spoke/lugs/bytype/ does not exist, log 'flat-lug spoke — Steps 5b/5c skipped' and jump to 5d.
